title: Ich heisse Emma - Introducing Yourself
grammar_topic: Personal pronouns and heissen, kommen, wohnen

grammar.topic: du vs Sie - informal vs formal address

forms.du - friends, family, children: Use with people you know well
forms.Sie - doctors, patients, strangers: Use with everyone else - always capitalize
forms.heissen: to be called: ich heisse, du heisst, er/sie heisst
forms.kommen: to come: ich komme, du kommst, er/sie kommt
forms.wohnen: to live: ich wohne, du wohnst, er/sie wohnt

objectives: Introduce yourself with name, origin, and profession
Ask others for their name and origin
nursing_note: In German hospitals you always use Sie with patients and senior colleagues. Using du with a patient you do not know is rude.
